TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 05
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON JUL-19-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL

9:00AM, DEPT 5, JUDGE WICK. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT, PLTF PHILIP KARP & MARCUS STERLING, PRESENT IN PRO PER, JESTINE REED, FAILING TO APPEAR. ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. CAUSE SUBMITTED. COURT RULES JUDGMENT FOR PLTF. LEASE IS DECLARED FORFEITED. CLERK TO PREPARE ORDER. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN & RETURNED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STERLING, MARCUS REID, JESTINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 574 3RD STREET, #129, S.F, CA. 94107 $514.12 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $594.12, LEASE FORFEITED
